settings.title: Organization Settings
settings.notConfigured: Supabase not configured in this environment — account identity unavailable.
settings.signInToView: Sign in to view subscription status.
settings.noMarketplaceConnected: No marketplace connected yet — go to /connect to link one.
settings.noLiveIntegration: No live marketplace integration connected yet — connect Trendyol, Hepsiburada, N11 or Shopify from /connect.
settings.refreshFootnote: Pulls your latest real orders again using the same credentials from connect — never asks for your API key twice.
settings.sessionCopy: End your session on this device. You'll need to sign in again to return.
settings.disconnectCopy: This deletes the stored credential — you'll need to reconnect to sync again. You can also choose to delete the order data already pulled from this marketplace.
settings.disconnectAndDelete: Disconnect and delete this marketplace's data

copilot.title: Analyst Copilot
copilot.pickPreset: Pick a preset or ask your own question below.
copilot.groundedIn: Grounded in {{seller}}'s structured decision. No numbers invented.
copilot.ruleBasedAiFailedTitle: The LLM call failed for this answer (rate limit, quota, or network) — a deterministic rule-based lookup against the same decision data was used instead.
copilot.ruleBasedNoLlmTitle: No LLM is configured — this is a deterministic rule-based lookup, not a language model response.
copilot.couldNotReach: Could not reach the Analyst Copilot.

presets.whyLimit: Why did this seller get this limit?

financing.approvedCopy: Priced at a take-rate of {{rate}}% (target band 3–6%). Sized to real contribution profit, not a revenue snapshot.
financing.declinedCopy: This seller's true margin can't service new debt, so the model advances {{amount}}. A revenue-snapshot lender would not see this — and would lend anyway.
financing.ruleBasedExplainable: Rule-based and explainable (EU AI Act) — recorded immutably as a decision trace, seq #{{seq}} in the append-only ledger.
financing.limitedData: Limited data (N={{months}} mo.) — results are not predictive, informative only.
financing.proofPoints: Platform proof points · seed-stage pilot (not your account)
financing.benchmarkFootnote: N=3 design partners — proof of mechanism, not a statistical loss-rate. Target column reflects the Lendflow 2025 embedded-lending benchmark cited in the underwriting diligence memo.

history.title: Decision Ledger
history.descAuth: Every real underwriting decision on your account is written once and never mutated — recorded to Postgres whenever your data changes and the decision genuinely moves.
history.descDemo: Every underwriting decision is written once and never mutated — the auditable record due diligence looks for, and the store of the decision traces that are the real, un-copyable moat.
history.noDecisions: No decisions recorded yet — connect a marketplace or upload data from My Data, and your first underwriting decision will appear here.
history.sinkAuth: sink: Postgres (decision_ledger, RLS-scoped to your account, append-only).

cashFlow.title: Cash Flow
cashFlow.subtitle: From sale date to estimated bank credit — marketplace delivery + payment cycle model.
cashFlow.noTransactions: No transactions found for this channel.
cashFlow.delayModel: Delay model: Trendyol 17d · Amazon US 21d · Hepsiburada 15d (delivery + payment cycle).
cashFlow.realFootnote: The real amount is calculated by applying the settlement-verification gap rate. Compare against your real bank statement.
cashFlow.representativeFootnote: (R) Representative: no real settlement/payment file connected yet — the "Representative" column is assumed equal to the expected amount, not a verified bank reconciliation.
cashFlow.noRealSettlementTitle: No real settlement file — assumed equal to the expected amount.

benchmark.title: Sector benchmark
benchmark.betterThan: Ahead of {{pct}}% of peers in your segment
benchmark.methodology: Peers are segmented by marketplace, category and revenue size. Live figures are percentiles pooled across ≥5 real sellers in your segment (k-anonymous — no individual seller is exposed); segments with too few sellers fall back to a representative published estimate, clearly labelled. Your values are computed by the same engine that powers the rest of your dashboard.
